traits.locale_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict negative effects.
Whenever the user grants an ally an extra turn, any stimulants used by that ally during that turn do not inflict negative effects.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} wounds.

Using combat stimulants does not inflict negative effects.
Whenever the user grants an ally an extra turn, any stimulants used by that ally during that turn do not inflict negative effects.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} wounds.

Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

Using combat stimulants does not inflict negative effects.
Whenever the user grants an ally an extra turn, any stimulants used by that ally during this turn do not inflict negative effects.
If the user chooses themselves as the target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} wounds.

Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.
If the user chooses themselves as the target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

languages.text:
Использование боевых стимуляторов не накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g}.
Когда обладатель аугмента предоставляет союзнику {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, стимуляторы, использованные этим союзником в течение этого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, не накладывают негативные эффекты.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Использование боевых стимуляторов не накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g}.
Когда обладатель аугмента предоставляет союзнику {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, стимуляторы, использованные этим союзником в течение этого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, не накладывают негативные эффекты.
Если обладатель аугмента выбирает себя целью боевого стимулятора, он восстанавливает {uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}.

Использование боевых стимуляторов не накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g}.
Когда обладатель аугмента предоставляет союзнику {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, стимуляторы, использованные этим союзником в течение этого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, не накладывают негативные эффекты.
Если обладатель аугмента выбирает себя целью боевого стимулятора, он восстанавливает {uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}.

languages.text:
Usar estimulantes de combate no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efectos negativos{/g}.
Cada vez que el usuario otorgue un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno extra{/g} a un aliado, los estimulantes que utilice ese aliado durante este {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} no tendrán efectos negativos.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Usar estimulantes de combate no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efectos negativos{/g}.
Cada vez que el usuario otorgue un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno extra{/g} a un aliado, los estimulantes que utilice ese aliado durante este {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} no tendrán efectos negativos.

languages.text:
Der Einsatz von Kampfstimulanzien bewirkt keine {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekte{/g}.
Gewährt der Nutzer einem Verbündeten einen {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}Zusatzzug{/g}, verursachen von diesem Verbündeten im aktuellen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} eingesetzte Stimulanzien keine negative Effekte.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Der Einsatz von Kampfstimulanzien bewirkt keine {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekte{/g}.
Gewährt der Nutzer einem Verbündeten einen {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}Zusatzzug{/g}, verursachen von diesem Verbündeten im aktuellen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} eingesetzte Stimulanzien keine negative Effekte.

languages.text:
Çatışma uyarıcıları kullanmak {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkileri{/g} tetiklemez.
Kullanıcı, bir dost birime {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} kazandırdığında o dost birimin o {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} kullandığı hiçbir uyarıcı, olumsuz etkilere sebep olmaz.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
Çatışma uyarıcıları kullanmak {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkileri{/g} tetiklemez.
Kullanıcı, bir dost birime {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} kazandırdığında o dost birimin o {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} kullandığı hiçbir uyarıcı, olumsuz etkilere sebep olmaz.

languages.text:
L'utilisation de stimulants de combat n'applique pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effets négatifs{/g}.
Lorsque l'utilisateur octroie un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} à un allié, les stimulants utilisés par ce dernier au cours de ce {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} n'infligent pas d'effets négatifs.
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisation de stimulants de combat n'applique pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effets négatifs{/g}.
Lorsque l'utilisateur octroie un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} à un allié, les stimulants utilisés par ce dernier au cours de ce {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} n'infligent pas d'effets négatifs.

languages.text:
使用战斗兴奋剂不会产生{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}。
每当使用者赋予盟友一个{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}时，该盟友在此{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内使用的任何兴奋剂都不会造成负面效果。
languages.original_text:
Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.

traits.locale_text:
使用战斗兴奋剂不会产生{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}。
每当使用者赋予盟友一个{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}时，该盟友在此{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内使用的任何兴奋剂都不会造成负面效果。

languages.text:
戦闘用刺激剤を使用しても{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}マイナス効果は生じない{/g} 。
使用者が味方に{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}追加ターン{/g} を与えるたび、その{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g} にその味方が使用した刺激剤はマイナス効果を与えない。
使用者が戦闘刺激剤の対象として自身を選んだ場合、その使用者は+{uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g} を回復する。

Using combat stimulants does not inflict {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g}.
Whenever the user grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}, any stimulants used by that ally during this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} do not inflict negative effects.
If the user chooses themselves as the target of a combat stimulant, they regain +{uip|Heal|ffc82c2471df4fd29c03360e425886ef} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.
